app.name: Magic Mind Reader
title: Magic Mind Reader
subtitle: Think of anything from your chosen topic... Let the magic read your mind!
select_topic_desc: Select what category you want the magic to read!
remember_desc: Choose 1 item below and keep it in your mind!
question: Is your secret pick here?
result_message: The item in your mind is
about_desc: Magic Mind Reader is a mind-reading game using binary math algorithms to accurately guess whatever item you have in mind!
